# Agent Content Watermark MCP

> Agent Content Watermark MCP - dedicated EU AI Act Article 50(2) GenAI watermarking with C2PA mani...

`agent-content-watermark-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install agent-content-watermark-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx agent-content-watermark-mcp
```

## Tools

- `generate_watermark`
- `verify_watermark`
- `attach_c2pa_manifest`
- `list_modalities` — Return the supported content modalities and watermarking methods.
- `code_of_practice_status` — Return current GPAI Code of Practice version + Article 50 effective date.
- `sign_conformity_attestation`

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/agent-content-watermark-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/agent-content-watermark-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
